query: SELECT DATE(createdAt) as order_date, outletId, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(totalAmount)/100 as total_rupees FROM orders WHERE id BETWEEN 4680014 AND 4680079 GROUP BY DATE(createdAt), outletId ORDER BY order_date;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT DATE(createdAt) as order_date, outletId, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(totalAmount)/100 as total_rupees FROM orders WHERE id BETWEEN 4680014 AND 4680079 GROUP BY DATE(createdAt), outletId ORDER BY order_date;
